title: If It Makes You Happy
album: Sheryl: Music From The Feature Documentary
why_this_song: If It Makes You Happy by Sheryl Crow (1996) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 10 times; first heard in: "If it makes you happy"
Appears 10 times; first heard in: "If it makes you happy"
Appears 5 times; first heard in: "It can't be that bad"
Appears 5 times; first heard in: "Then why the hell are you so sad?"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "Well, okay, I made this up"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: Then why the hell are you so sad?
Put on a poncho, played for mosquitoes
And drank 'til I was thirsty again

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "makes" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "makes" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "happy" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "happy" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

exercises.prompt_en: "If It Makes You Happy" was released in 1996. Do you think the themes in the song are timeless, or do they feel dated? Give one example from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: "If It Makes You Happy" foi lançada em 1996. Você acha que os temas da música são atemporais ou já parecem datados? Dê um exemplo do que ouviu.

exercises.prompt_en: Imagine you are making a short film with "If It Makes You Happy" as the soundtrack. What scene would you show while the chorus plays?
exercises.prompt_pt: Imagine que você vai fazer um curta com "If It Makes You Happy" como trilha sonora. Que cena você mostraria no momento do refrão?

exercises.prompt_en: The singer makes a claim or statement in this song. Do you agree with it? Use evidence from the lyrics to support your answer.
exercises.prompt_pt: O cantor faz uma afirmação nessa música. Você concorda? Use pelo menos um verso para defender sua resposta.

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
